generated_from: expo/docs/pages/eas/hosting/api-routes.mdx @ 2026-06-07; themes are LUMINANCE-DERIVED (all 3 read near-white ~248-250 => light; image-read API was saturated, but near-white is an unambiguous light-mode signal, low risk). Routes confirmed from universe (SidebarLinks.tsx:287-333, helpers.ts:139-174): Hosting is project-scoped at /accounts/[account]/projects/[project]/hosting. Crashes (/hosting/crashes) and project-level Requests (/hosting/requests) are direct routes (auto-capture). Logs are DEPLOYMENT-level (/hosting/deployments/[deploymentId]/logs, no URL token) so logs is NEEDS_REACH via the deployments list. BIG CAVEAT: all three need a project with EAS Hosting DEPLOYED and live traffic/crash data; the default project almost certainly has no hosting, so expect empty zero-states or ERROR. Pass --project=<slug> for a project that actually uses EAS Hosting, or this section is not meaningfully auditable.

reach: open a deployment from Hosting > Deployments, then open its Logs tab
